AnimationIdentifier.description: A camelCase identifier referencing an animation token by name

StateName.description: A CSS pseudo-class name (e.g. 'hover', 'focus-visible') or CustomStateSet name (e.g. 'loading')

PartName.description: ':host' for the element itself, or a CSS part name (e.g. 'prefix-icon')

ComponentFile.description: Root structure of a component animation token source file
ComponentFile.title: ComponentFile

ComponentMap.description: A map of component element names (e.g. 'mdc-button') to their animation entries
ComponentMap.title: ComponentMap

ComponentEntry.description: Binds an animation token to a component part and optional state(s)

state.description: One or more states that must be active for this rule to apply

ComponentEntry.title: ComponentEntry
